Utah Water Systems across Utah DWRi, DWRe and DDW
Locations in the USBR RISE API
The proxied version of the NOAA River Forecast Center APIs as it is present within the USBR / IoW Western Water Datahub here: https://api.wwdh.internetofwater.app/
The proxied version of the USBR RISE API as it is present within the USBR / IoW Western Water Datahub
The proxied version of the AWDB (Air and Water Database) API forecast data as it is present within the USBR / IoW Western Water Datahub here: https://api.wwdh.internetofwater.app/
The proxied version of the USACE SNOTEL API as it is present within the USBR / IoW Western Water Datahub here: https://api.wwdh.internetofwater.app/
The proxied version of the USACE Access2Water API as it is present within the USBR / IoW Western Water Datahub here: https://api.wwdh.internetofwater.app/

EPA Safe Drinking Water Public Water Systems data served from the Geoconnex reference feature server
